## Verification / 検証

- [ ] `npm run lint` / `npm run build` pass locally (CI re-checks)
- [ ] UI change → visually verified with the `verifier-web` skill ("compiles" is not "renders")
- [ ] Data change → `npm run validate:data` passes; no fabricated dates (empty state > wrong date)
